history.details: Project initialized, GitHub connected
PRD approved
Design brief approved — shadcn/ui, Linear-style dark theme, blue accent
6 phases defined, starting Phase 1

9 issues created (#1-#9), added to Project Board #4
Phase 1 implemented — all 9 tasks done, PR #10 merged
Phase 2 plan approved — 10 tasks (Task Manager)
10 issues created (#11-#20), added to Project Board #4
Phase 2 implemented — all 10 tasks done, PR #21 merged

Phase 4 implemented — all 11 tasks done, PR #46 merged

10 issues created (#62-#71), added to Project Board #4
Phase 6 implemented — all 10 tasks done, PRs #72-#81 created
